tasks.subject: Task 1: Bootstrap test infrastructure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Empty script skeleton + a single sanity test + CI step that runs `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs` on every PR. Every subsequent task verifies its work by adding tests here.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/nexus-triage.mjs`
- Create: `scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs`
- Modify: `.github/workflows/build.yml` — add one step to the existing `check` job

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs exits 0
- CI check job runs new step
- Existing check steps unchanged

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs` → 1 passing test, exit code 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/nexus-triage.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", ".github/workflows/build.yml"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs exits 0", "CI check job runs new step", "Existing check steps unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: State file load/save with strict failure modes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** loadState/saveState with hard-fail messaging on missing file / malformed JSON / schema_version mismatch.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.mjs
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs
- Create: scripts/fixtures/state-populated.json

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/nexus-triage.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "scripts/fixtures/state-populated.json"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loadState missing file exits 2 with bootstrap message", "loadState malformed JSON exits 2 with path", "loadState schema_version mismatch exits 2", "saveState round-trip preserves data", "50+30+100 entry round-trip succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Title sanitizer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** sanitizeTitle(body) strips backticks/HTML/@mentions, truncates at word boundary at 60 chars.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.mjs
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/nexus-triage.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["backticks stripped", "HTML tags stripped, content kept", "@mentions stripped", "60-char word-boundary truncation", "non-ASCII preserved", "empty/whitespace returns empty string"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Classifier with priority-ordered rules
tasks.description:
**Goal:** classify(text, kind) returns {classification, confidence} with priority-ordered rule matching.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.mjs
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/nexus-triage.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["every bug_high term tested", "every bug_med term tested", "every feat_high term tested", "question matches ASCII and full-width", "kudos boundary at 79/80/81", "priority: bug wins over positive", "non-English defaults to needs-triage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Issue body template + renderer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Static template at scripts/nexus-triage-prompt.md + renderIssueBody that fills placeholders and collapses optional metadata slots.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/nexus-triage-prompt.md
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.mjs
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/nexus-triage.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage-prompt.md"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all placeholders substituted", "comment item omits orphan Title/GameVersion/Status lines", "bug item includes all metadata", "non-ASCII author preserved", "body rendered verbatim inside blockquote", "untrusted-content warning present", "triage-bot footer has correct nexus_id"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: GraphQL client + introspection with two-tier drift policy
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetchModComments/fetchModBugReports/introspectSchema with hard-fail on missing comments, soft-degrade on missing bugReports.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.mjs
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs
- Create: scripts/fixtures/graphql-comments-mixed.json
- Create: scripts/fixtures/graphql-bugs-mixed.json
- Create: scripts/fixtures/graphql-schema-drift-bugreports.json
- Create: scripts/fixtures/graphql-schema-drift-comments.json

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/nexus-triage.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "scripts/fixtures/graphql-comments-mixed.json", "scripts/fixtures/graphql-bugs-mixed.json", "scripts/fixtures/graphql-schema-drift-bugreports.json", "scripts/fixtures/graphql-schema-drift-comments.json"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetchModComments POSTs with apikey header", "fetchModBugReports filters status:[open]", "introspectSchema returns correct flags", "missing mod.comments exits 2", "missing mod.bugReports soft flag no exit", "setHttpFetch indirection works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Orchestrator with maintainer-exclude + per-run cap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** main() pipeline: introspect, fetch, exclude maintainers FIRST, filter closed bugs, dedup, classify, cap 5, render, gh issue create, update state.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.mjs
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/nexus-triage.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["maintainer filter runs first", "case-insensitive maintainer match", "already-seen skipped silently", "closed bugs skipped on first sight", "per-run cap = 5 non-kudos", "kudos do not count toward cap", "oldest-first by createdAt", "dry-run makes zero gh calls and no state write"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: CLI entry point — flags, bootstrap, killswitch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parseArgs / --bootstrap / --dry-run / --help / sentinel killswitch / module-import safety.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.mjs
- Modify: scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs

**Verify:** `node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs && node scripts/nexus-triage.mjs --help`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/nexus-triage.mjs", "scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node --test scripts/nexus-triage.test.mjs && node scripts/nexus-triage.mjs --help", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--help prints and exits 0", "--bootstrap seeds state with no issues filed", "--dry-run makes no gh calls or state write", "sentinel file exits 0", "missing env var exits 2 with name", "module importable without running main"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: nexus-triage.yml hourly workflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GH Actions workflow that runs the triage script hourly. Cron commented out by default; dispatch input dry_run.

**Files:**
- Create: .github/workflows/nexus-triage.yml

**Verify:** `python -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/nexus-triage.yml')); print('OK')"`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/nexus-triage.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/nexus-triage.yml')); print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cron commented out by default", "workflow_dispatch with dry_run input", "concurrency nexus-triage cancel-in-progress false", "permissions contents and issues write", "state commit by github-actions[bot]", "YAML parses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: claude.yml reactive handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Standard anthropics/claude-code-action@v1 reactive setup with CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.

**Files:**

**Verify:** `python -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/claude.yml')); print('OK')"`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/claude.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/claude.yml')); print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["triggers issues issue_comment PR review comment", "conditional contains @claude", "permissions contents read issues write", "uses CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN not api key", "YAML parses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Watchdog workflows (ping + check)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Weekly @claude liveness probe. Mon 09:00 UTC opens ping issue; Mon 11:00 UTC checks for PING-OK reply and files ops:token-renewal if missing.

**Files:**
- Create: .github/workflows/nexus-watchdog.yml
- Create: .github/workflows/nexus-watchdog-check.yml

**Verify:** `python -c "import yaml; [yaml.safe_load(open(f)) for f in ['.github/workflows/nexus-watchdog.yml', '.github/workflows/nexus-watchdog-check.yml']]; print('OK')"`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/nexus-watchdog.yml", ".github/workflows/nexus-watchdog-check.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import yaml; [yaml.safe_load(open(f)) for f in ['.github/workflows/nexus-watchdog.yml', '.github/workflows/nexus-watchdog-check.yml']]; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ping Mon 09:00 UTC opens labeled issue", "check Mon 11:00 UTC verifies PING-OK", "missing reply files ops:token-renewal assigned to MohamedSerhan", "ping closed regardless", "both YAMLs parse"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Operator runbook in RELEASING.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append `## Operator runbook — Nexus triage` section to RELEASING.md covering Day 0 setup, annual renewal, killswitches, and ops:* response playbooks.

**Files:**
- Modify: RELEASING.md

**Verify:** `grep -c "## Operator runbook — Nexus triage" RELEASING.md` → 1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["RELEASING.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c '## Operator runbook — Nexus triage' RELEASING.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["section heading appears exactly once", "Day 0 setup checklist included", "annual renewal procedure included", "killswitches documented", "watchdog-fired playbook included", "schema-gap-fired playbook included"]}
```
